title: If I can make it in America, you can too: Diane Hendricks
text:
E
HENDRICKS.
>> GOOD EVENING.
MY NAME IS DIANE
HEND RICKS AND I'VE LIVING
PROOF THAT THE AMERICAN
TREATMENT IS POSSIBLE WITH
HARD WORK AND
DETERMINATION.
I GREW UP ON A DAIRY FARM IN
WISCONSIN.
[APPLAUSE]
I WAS ONE OF 9 GIRLS, NO
BOYS.
I DREAMED OF MOVING TO THE
CITY.
AND WEARING A BLUE SUIT.
BUT AT THE AGE OF 17, I
BECAME PREGNANT,
THAT WAS NOT PART OF MY
PLAN, I BELIEVE EVERY LIFE
IS A SACRED GIFT FROM
GOD.
AND I GIVE THANKS EVERY DAY
FOR MY SON.
AS A SINGLE MOM, I WORKED
TWO JOBS TO PAY THE BILLS, I
FOUND MY PASSION IN THE
FIELD OF REAL ESTATE.
WHEN I MET MY HUSBAND, KEN,
HE WAS A ROOFING CONTRACTOR,
AND TOGETHER WE SAW AN
OPPORTUNITY AND A NEED TO
DEVELOP A DISTRIBUTION
CHAIN.
AND WE RISKED EVERYTHING WE
HAD TO START THAT COMPANY.
TODAY, ABC SUPPLY EMPLOYEES
OVER 22 THOUSAND AMERICANS,
WE'RE THE LARGEST ROOFING
DISTRIBUTOR IN THE COUNTRY.
BUT WHAT IS MORE IMPORTANT
IS WE'RE CREATING THE JOBS
RIGHT HERE IN THE UNITED
STATES OF AMERICA.
[APPLAUSE]
I LOST MY HUSBAND 16 YEARS
AGO, IT WAS THE TOUGHEST
TIME IN MY LIFE.
THANK GOD I HAD OUR 7
CHILDREN TO BE MY SUPPORT.
BUT I HAD TO DECIDE WHETHER
TO FIGHT OR FOLD, I CHOSE TO
FIGHT.
[APPLAUSE]
SINCE THEN I HAVE QUADRUPLED
THE SIZE OF OUR COMPANIES
AND TO MY SURPRISE IS WAS
RECOGNIZED AS MOST
SUCCESSFUL SELF MADE WOMEN
IN AMERICAN HISTORY.
[APPLAUSE]
SO TO ALL OF YOU ASPIRING
ENTREPRENEURS OUT THERE, IF
I CAN MAKE IT, YOU CAN MAKE
IT  TOO.
MY SUCCESS STORY AS A
TEENAGE MOM WITHOUT A
COLLEGE DEGREE WAS ONLY
POSSIBLE BECAUSE I WAS SO
BLESSED TO BE BORN IN THE
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
[APPLAUSE]
BUT TODAY THE AMERICAN DREAM
IS UNDER THREAT.
SINCE JOE BIDEN AND KAMALA
HARRIS TOOK OVER THE
OFFICES, PRICES HAVE RISEN
OVER 20%.
ASPIRING ENTREPRENEURS
CANNOT AFFORD TO TAKE OUT A
LOAN AT 7 TO 15% INTEREST,
REGULATIONS HAVE SURGED AND
ADMINISTRATION PROPOSED 7
TRILLION IN TAX INCREASES.
I KNOW HOW HARD IT IS TO
BUILD A COMPANY.
FROM NOTHING.
AND WE NEED A PRESIDENT WHO
UNDERSTANDS THAT TOO.
WE NEED A BUILDER BACK IN
THE WHITE HOUSE.
[APPLAUSE]
SOMEONE WHO WILL CUT THE JOB
KILLING REGULATIONS, LOWER
TAXES ON WORKING FAMILIES
AND GIVE THE POWER BACK TO
THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.
[APPLAUSE]
IN LIFE, IT IS EASY TO
QUIT.
AND VERY HARD TO WIN.
PRESIDENT TRUMP IS NOT A
QUITTER.
HE IS A FIGHTER, AND I AM
CONFIDENT THAT IF WE DO ALL
OUR PART WE CAN AND WE WILL
WIN RIGHT HERE IN
WISCONSIN.
AND HE WILL WIN FOR AMERICA
OVER THE NEXT 4 YEARS.
THANK YOU.
GOD BLESS YOU.
GOD BL
